title: dagal #1713
definition:
1) to look, behold
    1a) (Qal) looked at, conspicuous (participle)
 2) to carry a banner or standard, set up banner or standard
    2a) (Qal) to set up standard (in battle)
    2b) (Niphal) supplied with banners, bannered
nasbUsage:
